title: ibgepy: access the IBGE Aggregate Data API (SIDRA) from Python
description: ibgepy is a pandas-friendly Python client for the IBGE Aggregate Data API (SIDRA) of the Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics (IBGE). It queries aggregates, variables, localities, periods, subjects, surveys and metadata from the surveys and censuses conducted by IBGE, returning every fetch as a pandas DataFrame. It is the Python port of the R package ibger; the public function names mirror the R API so knowledge transfers directly between the two.
